case_title: WILSON, HENRY vs. BERGUM, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY SERVED AUG-04-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUM, ROBERT
